decks.notes: The key focus of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's game plan through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and hand disruption. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Fatal Push and Counterspell, while also disrupting the opponent's hand with cards like Thoughtseize. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares provide additional card advantage and control options. The deck's mana base supports its control strategy with a mix of dual lands and fetch lands to ensure consistent access to all necessary colors of mana.

The deck revolves around ramping quickly with Arboreal Grazer and Amulet of Vigor to get Primeval Titan onto the battlefield as soon as possible. The goal is to assemble the Amulet Titan combo by using lands like Urza's Saga and Lotus Field to generate extra mana and play multiple lands. This allows for explosive plays with cards like Scapeshift and Green Sun's Zenith to search for key pieces or win conditions. The deck also includes utility lands to support the combo pieces and protect against disruption, making it a powerful and resilient deck in Modern 1 vs 1.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly summoning a diverse array of creatures and utilizing efficient spells to overwhelm the opponent with powerful attacks. The deck includes a mix of creatures with different abilities such as haste, token generation, and card advantage. Spells like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge provide additional removal and damage options, while cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer offer board presence and card advantage. By maintaining a fast and aggressive playstyle, this deck aims to pressure the opponent and finish the game swiftly.

The main concept of the deck is to ramp up quickly using cards like Utopia Sprawl and Talisman of Impulse to get Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Sire of Seven Deaths onto the battlefield faster. Control the game by using cards like Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command to disrupt your opponent's strategy while also having access to powerful spells like World Breaker and Vibrance. Utilize the Eldrazi Temple and Ugin's Labyrinth to generate extra mana to cast your high-cost creatures and spells efficiently.

This deck focuses on putting pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Phelia, Phlage, and Ragavan, while disrupting their game plan with cards like Galvanic Discharge and Teferi, Time Raveler. The deck also has a control aspect with cards like Solitude and Consign to Memory to deal with threats. The strategic use of cards like Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and Ephemerate allows for versatility in gameplay. The mana base is designed to support the deck's colors and ensure consistent casting of spells. Overall, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory.

This deck aims to ramp up mana quickly using cards like Utopia Sprawl and Eldrazi Temple to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Sire of Seven Deaths. It also includes control elements like Kozilek's Return and Malevolent Rumble to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck has a mix of ramp, control, and big threats to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier, and Griselbrand, then using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate to bring them back onto the battlefield to surprise and overwhelm opponents. Psychic Frog and Quantum Riddler provide disruption and card advantage, while Solitude and Subtlety offer protection. The deck also includes various ways to interact with the opponent's strategy, such as Thoughtseize and Force of Negation, making it a versatile and resilient combo deck that can adapt to different matchups.

The primary focus of this deck is to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. It uses powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler and Narset, Parter of Veils to control the board and limit the opponent's options. Additionally, it includes various sideboard options like Solitude and Subtlety to provide additional answers to threats. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by generating card advantage and maintaining control of the game until it can secure a win condition.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of low-cost aggressive creatures and powerful spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By efficiently using mana and taking advantage of Leyline synergies, the deck aims to establish board presence early and maintain pressure throughout the game. The inclusion of versatile removal spells and counter spells helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect your own threats. With a flexible mana base and a mix of creature types, this deck can adapt to different matchups and strategies, making it a formidable force in Modern 1 vs 1 play.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast-paced aggression, utilizing efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly overwhelm opponents. The deck also includes powerful support cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to maintain pressure. Additionally, cards like Seasoned Pyromancer and Goblin Bombardment provide additional value and reach. The inclusion of disruptive cards like Thraben Charm and Blood Moon help disrupt opponents' strategies, while lands like Arena of Glory and Sacred Foundry ensure consistent mana production. The deck aims to win the game swiftly through a combination of creature damage and burn spells.

The focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to maintain a quick and aggressive offense, utilizing cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride to put pressure on opponents. The deck also includes some control elements such as Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Static Prison to disrupt opponent's strategies. The presence of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory supports the aggro strategy by providing additional sources of damage and combat tricks. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and relentless attack while controlling the battlefield to secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly building up a board of aggressive Human creatures, supported by cards like Champion of the Parish, Thalia's Lieutenant, and Adeline, Resplendent Cathar. By using cards like Aether Vial and Rally at the Hornburg, it aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient creature swarm. The mana base is optimized for consistent access to the necessary colors for the deck's spells, with some utility lands included. The strategy is to apply early pressure and maintain a steady stream of threats to close out the game swiftly.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifact creatures and artifacts to quickly and aggressively overwhelm the opponent. By playing cards like Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer, followed by powerful artifacts like Mox Opal and Engineered Explosives, the deck aims to quickly establish board presence and control. By efficiently utilizing cards like Mishra's Bauble and Preordain to draw into key pieces and disruption like Claws of Gix and Shadowspear, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent. The inclusion of Urza's Saga and Metallic Rebuke further enhances the deck's ability to quickly close out games.

This deck revolves around putting powerful creatures into the graveyard and then bringing them back onto the battlefield to overwhelm the opponent. Using cards like Unearth, Persist, and Faithless Looting, the deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures such as Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones. The combination of reanimation spells, control elements like Thoughtseize and Spell Pierce, and removal like Fatal Push makes it a versatile and unpredictable deck that can win through explosive combos or incremental value.

This deck focuses on using Birthing Ritual to quickly ramp up mana and play powerful creatures like Abhorrent Oculus, Coiling Oracle, and Ice-Fang Coatl. The deck also includes disruption cards like Flare of Denial and Force of Negation to control the game and protect your creatures. With a mix of card advantage from Shardless Agent and Subtlety, along with powerful finishers like Endurance and Harbinger of the Seas, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its aggressive strategy while still maintaining control over the battlefield.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent through aggressive creature plays and burn spells. By utilizing low-cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, along with efficient spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart, the deck aims to deal consistent damage and pressure the opponent. Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration provide card advantage and help with deck filtering, while cards like Mutagenic Growth and Violent Urge can provide additional boosts to creatures or help push through damage. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive strategy.
